title: Baseball Bros
description: Online multiplayer baseball! Hit home runs, steal bases, strike out the side! Experience fast-paced competitive gameplay with real-time multiplayer.

title: Slope
description: Drive your ball down the slope! The further you go, the faster it gets. Avoid obstacles and stay on the track.

title: Tunnel Rush
description: Fast-paced 3D arcade game where you zip through tunnels while dodging obstacles. Can you survive?

title: Retro Bowl
description: Management and arcade football! Build your team and win the championship in this retro-styled masterpiece.
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><base href="https://fastly.jsdelivr.net/gh/bubbls/UGS-Assets@main/retro-bowl/"><meta charset="utf-8"><title>Retro Bowl</title><style>html, body { margin:0; padding:0; overflow:hidden; width:100%; height:100%; background:#000; }</style></head><body><script src="retro-bowl.js"></script></body></html>

title: Five Nights at Epstein's
description: Can you survive five nights in this mysterious and creepy island? Watch the cameras, manage your power, and stay alert.

title: Geometry Dash Lite
description: Jump and fly your way through danger in this rhythm-based action platformer!

title: Minecraft
description: Play Minecraft 1.8.8 in your browser. Experience the classic sandbox survival game.

title: Stickman Hook
description: Swing like a spider! Hook onto points and make incredible jumps.
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><base href="https://fastly.jsdelivr.net/gh/genizy/google-class@cd06df26d3c4d9f73c8151fc13f7b2dc27f3adda/stickman-hook/"><meta charset="utf-8" /><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=0" /><style>html,body { margin: 0; padding: 0; overflow: hidden; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; background: #000; } canvas { width: 100%; height: 100%; }</style></head><body><script type="text/javascript" src="js/bundle.js"></script></body></html>

title: Time Shooter 3 SWAT
description: Time only moves when you move. Eliminate enemies and complete missions.
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><base href="https://fastly.jsdelivr.net/gh/mistirk/google@eebffdf79a14f6e01e153d5cd4bed23c432874fb/version/time-s3/"><meta charset="utf-8"><title>Time Shooter 3 SWAT</title><style>html, body { margin: 0; background: #000; overflow: hidden; width:100%; height:100%; } #unity-canvas { width: 100%; height: 100%; }</style></head><body><canvas id="unity-canvas"></canvas><script src="ts3.loader.js"></script><script>createUnityInstance(document.querySelector('#unity-canvas'), { dataUrl: 'ts3.data', frameworkUrl: 'ts3.framework.js', codeUrl: 'ts3.wasm', companyName: 'GoGoMan', productName: 'Time Shooter SWAT', productVersion: '0.03' });</script></body></html>

title: Bad Parenting
description: A psychological horror game exploring dark themes of family and trauma.

title: Baldi's Basics
description: Educational fun! Collect notebooks and escape the school while Baldi chases you.
